draft_prompts.planner: Develop a plan to implement OpenMP directives in the given C++ code to compute the perimeter of the smallest convex polygon containing all points in parallel.
draft_prompts.code_gen: Write C++ code that uses OpenMP to parallelize the computation of the smallest convex polygon containing all points and returns its perimeter.
draft_prompts.tester: Write test cases to verify that the parallelized code produces accurate results for various input sets of points.
draft_prompts.review: Inspect the code to ensure that it correctly implements the parallelization strategy and meets performance expectations.
